llm_recommendations.reason_for_recommendation: Mentioned as major jewellery brand with gold rates; festive demand expected to pick up for Akshaya Tritiya, though prices reflect a softer trend.
Mentioned as major jewellery brand with gold rates; festive demand expected to pick up for Akshaya Tritiya, though prices reflect a softer trend.
Indian airlines, including Indigo, face estimated Rs 2,500 Cr losses due to flight cuts, airspace closures, higher fuel consumption and operational costs from Gulf War/geopolitical tensions.
Axis Max Life Diversified Equity Fund II is offered through ULIPs of Axis Max Life Insurance, a joint venture involving Axis Bank. This indicates a strategic product launch and business expansion.

Axis Max Life Diversified Equity Fund II is offered through ULIPs of Axis Max Life Insurance, a joint venture involving Max Life Insurance (a subsidiary of Max Financial Services). This indicates a strategic product launch and business expansion.
ITC Hotels (a division of ITC Ltd.) plans significant expansion by FY29, shifting to higher-yielding formats and expecting 11.5% revenue growth.
Share price corrected over 20% in six months, analysts cut operating profit expectations due to geopolitical tensions and cancellations, despite moderate Q4FY26 operating profit growth.
Good Q3FY26 showing with improved RevPAR, pipeline of 1,180 keys, and consensus expectation of 20%+ operating profit growth through FY30.
Q3FY26 earnings impacted by higher operating expenses and renovations; tech investments to impact FY27 earnings; executive management transition and asset ownership listing may weigh on sentiment.
